text:
AOTs2Mä»–3 is the 16th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"AOTs2" is an abbreviation of Attack on Titan Season 2".

Musical motifs

The track is a piano cover of APETITAN (0:00-1:21) and the first part of YouSeeBIGGIRL/T:T (1:52-2:27).
